subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-10-28 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: If you are sincere in your love for me, then love and serve the believers of God, then love and serve your fellow-men.
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @unity; oneness of humanity
